title: Fimbriella peramoena
parts: Fimbriella peramoena. The medicinal parts of Fimbriella peramoena are not well-documented. However, it is believed that various parts of this species may have potential medicinal properties. In some cases, the leaves and stems of Fimbriella peramoena may be used in traditional medicine to treat certain health conditions. More research is needed to fully understand the medicinal properties and uses of Fimbriella peramoena.
